message:
fix(analysis): correct cross-label flow counting and stale-cleanup percentile

label_intel: rewrite outgoing-dep counting to scan all_issues for issues
that depend on the current label's issues, rather than iterating labels
on the same issue. This correctly identifies cross-label blocking
relationships. New test: flow_counts_outgoing_cross_label_deps.

suggest: fix stale-cleanup PageRank percentile calculation — use
floor((len-1) * pct) instead of ceil(len * pct) to avoid off-by-one
that could skip the last element. Add make_issue_with_dep helper and
test verifying high-impact blockers aren't flagged as stale.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
